steps.title: Set up equations from percentage statements
steps.content:
From A is 468% of B: $A = 4.68B$
From A is 0.780% of C: $A = 0.00780C$

steps.title: Equate the expressions and isolate C
Simplify the ratio to find p
steps.content:
Evaluate $\frac{4.68}{0.00780}$:
$$\frac{4.68}{0.00780} = \frac{46800}{78} = 600$$

So $C = 600B$. Since $C$ is $p$ percent of $B$, we write $C = \frac{p}{100}B$. Therefore $\frac{p}{100} = 600$, and $p = 60000$.
